# Beads for the universal harness interface refactor.
#
# Governing specs:
#   - docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-014-universal-harness-interface.md
#   - docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-004-harness-implementation.md
#   - docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
#
# Sequencing note: beads in the 5x, 6x, 7x groups (per-harness migrations)
# can run in parallel with each other once 04 lands, but each group's
# sub-sequence (a → b → c → d → e → f) is strictly ordered. 08, 09 can
# start after 04 lands. 10, 11, 12 are tail-end and depend on prior
# migrations completing.

beads:
  # ----- Phase 0: Baseline and contract scaffolding -----

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-00
    title: "Pre-refactor baseline: pin CONTRACT-003 JSON fixtures and runtime baseline; grep cmd/ and root for hidden per-harness imports"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "testdata/contract-003/pre-refactor/ contains JSON fixtures for HarnessInfo, ProviderInfo, QuotaState, AccountStatus across all five harnesses and one subscription-backed provider"
      - "grep -rEn 'internal/harnesses/(claude|codex|gemini|opencode|pi)' --include='*.go' . (excluding the harness packages, node_modules, .claude/worktrees, benchmark-results, .ddx) is captured verbatim in the PR description; any file not in the plan's Service-side consumers or Tests inventory tables is added"
      - "testdata/perf-baselines/2026-05-14-pre-refactor.txt records go test -count=1 ./... -timeout 30m wall time"
      - "go test ./... -count=1 passes with fixtures committed"
    depends_on: []

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-01
    title: "Add Harness sub-interfaces and universal types (CONTRACT-004 Step 1)"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-004-harness-implementation.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "internal/harnesses/types.go declares QuotaHarness, AccountHarness, ModelDiscoveryHarness interfaces with the CONTRACT-004 signatures including SupportedLimitIDs() and SupportedAliases()"
      - "internal/harnesses/types.go declares QuotaStatus, AccountSnapshot, QuotaStateValue, RoutingPreference types and ErrAliasNotResolvable sentinel"
      - "Unit tests cover RoutingPreference enum identity, QuotaStateValue string mapping, sentinel error identity"
      - "No harness implements the new interfaces yet; service code is unchanged; go test ./... passes"
    depends_on:
      - BEAD-HARNESS-IF-00

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-02
    title: "Conformance suite and synthetic harness implementations"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "internal/harnesses/harnesstest package exports RunHarnessConformance, RunQuotaHarnessConformance, RunAccountHarnessConformance, RunModelDiscoveryHarnessConformance"
      - "Synthetic constructors NewSyntheticQuotaHarness, NewSyntheticAccountHarness, NewSyntheticModelDiscoveryHarness accept Supported* values as parameters"
      - "Conformance suite asserts emitted Windows[].LimitID is a subset of SupportedLimitIDs(); asserts ResolveModelAlias covers SupportedAliases() positive path and rejects out-of-set with ErrAliasNotResolvable"
      - "Suite asserts contract shape of single-flight (no error, consistent post-state on concurrent RefreshQuota), not exact probe count"
      - "Smoke test runs synthetic harnesses against the conformance suite and passes"
    depends_on:
      - BEAD-HARNESS-IF-01

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-03
    title: "CONTRACT-003 projection helpers (projectQuotaStatus, projectAccountSnapshot)"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-004-harness-implementation.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "service_projection.go (or equivalent) exports projectQuotaStatus(harnesses.QuotaStatus) *QuotaState and projectAccountSnapshot(harnesses.AccountSnapshot) *AccountStatus"
      - "Helpers drive every QuotaStateValue, every RoutingPreference, populated and empty Account/Detail, present and absent Reason in unit tests"
      - "Tests assert public JSON shape matches BEAD-HARNESS-IF-00 fixtures structurally"
      - "No service code calls the helpers yet — they exist for Phase 5+"
    depends_on:
      - BEAD-HARNESS-IF-02

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-04
    title: "Async refresh scheduler and harnessByName helper"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "Service struct gains a harnessByName(name string) harnesses.Harness method consulting the registered-harnesses field"
      - "service_refresh_scheduler.go owns a debounced ticker per registered QuotaHarness firing at QuotaFreshness()/2 and per AccountHarness whose AccountFreshness() differs from quota"
      - "Scheduler discovers harnesses by iterating service.harnessByName over the registry and type-asserting to QuotaHarness / AccountHarness independently"
      - "Scheduler reads QuotaStatus before each potential refresh to obtain CapturedAt; on cache-cold (State=QuotaUnavailable) the scheduler always calls RefreshQuota"
      - "Scheduler skips a tick when last-known QuotaStatus.CapturedAt is within QuotaFreshness() of now (cache-freshness dedup is the scheduler's job, not RefreshQuota's)"
      - "Startup refresh kickoff fires once on scheduler construction for every registered QuotaHarness / AccountHarness with a cache-cold state, per the cache-cold path in primary-harness-capability-baseline.md"
      - "Fake-clock tests prove debounce cadence, single-flight respect via cache lock, startup kickoff, and clean ctx cancel"
      - "Per-harness Refresh*Async helpers remain in place for now (deleted in each harness's e-step)"
    depends_on:
      - BEAD-HARNESS-IF-02

  # ----- Phase 5: Claude migration sub-sequence (strictly ordered) -----

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05A
    title: "claude.Runner: add CONTRACT-004 interface methods (additive; old surface still present)"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "claude.Runner implements QuotaStatus, RefreshQuota, QuotaFreshness, SupportedLimitIDs, AccountStatus, RefreshAccount, AccountFreshness, DefaultModelSnapshot, ResolveModelAlias, SupportedAliases"
      - "RefreshQuota probes unconditionally and uses the existing cache lock for single-flight (queued callers consume in-flight result)"
      - "Routing-preference mapping helper translates today's PreferClaude+freshness into RoutingPreference"
      - "package claude doc comment (doc.go or runner.go top) mirrors SupportedLimitIDs() and SupportedAliases() return values"
      - "harnesstest.RunHarnessConformance, RunQuotaHarnessConformance, RunAccountHarnessConformance, RunModelDiscoveryHarnessConformance all pass against &claude.Runner{}"
      - "Old per-harness cache I/O functions still exported and unchanged; both surfaces coexist"
    depends_on:
      - BEAD-HARNESS-IF-04

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05B
    title: "Migrate service.go claude consumers to QuotaHarness/AccountHarness interface"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "service.go drops the claudeharness import"
      - "Every claude-related call in service.go fetches the runner via harnessByName, type-asserts to the sub-interface, and projects through service_projection helpers"
      - "go test ./... passes; BEAD-HARNESS-IF-00 fixtures pass structural diff for claude rows"
    depends_on:
      - BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05A
      - BEAD-HARNESS-IF-03

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05C
    title: "Migrate service_providers.go claude consumers"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "service_providers.go drops claudeharness imports for claude paths"
      - "ClaudeQuotaSnapshot{} construction at service_providers.go:620 moves inside claude.Runner.RefreshQuota"
      - "Health-check callbacks become qh.RefreshQuota(ctx) calls"
      - "go test ./... passes; structural-diff fixtures pass"
    depends_on:

  - id: BEAD-HARNESS-IF-05D
    title: "Migrate service_models.go and service_subscription_quota.go claude consumers"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "service_models.go uses ModelDiscoveryHarness for claude alias resolution"
      - "service_subscription_quota.go consumes QuotaStatus.RoutingPreference; claudeQuotaMaxUsedPercent derives over QuotaStatus.Windows uniformly across claude and codex"
      - "Type assertion on *claudeharness.ClaudeQuotaSnapshot at service_subscription_quota.go:79 is removed"
      - "go test ./... passes; structural-diff fixtures pass"
    depends_on:

    title: "Delete and unexport claude public surface"
    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:

      - "RefreshClaudeQuotaAsync deleted; the Step 4 scheduler now drives claude refresh cadence"

      - "go test ./... passes; structural-diff fixtures pass"
    depends_on:

    spec_ref: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-14-harness-interface-refactor.md
    acceptance_criteria:
      - "service_status_test.go, service_subscription_quota_test.go, service_routing_errors_test.go, service_providers_test.go, service_routing_test.go, harness_golden_integration_test.go no longer reference claudeharness exports beyond the dispatcher constructor"
      - "internal/harnesses/claude/*_test.go files run as package claude (white-box) where they need unexported helpers"
      - "go test ./... passes; runtime budget maintained"

new file mode 100644
index 00000000..c17995f4
--- /dev/null
+++ b/internal/harnesses/claude/contract004.go
@@ -0,0 +1,270 @@
+package claude
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"strings"
+	"time"
+
+	"golang.org/x/sync/singleflight"
+
+	"github.com/easel/fizeau/internal/harnesses"
+)
+
+// claudeQuotaFreshness is the constant freshness window for claude quota
+// evidence. Mirrors DefaultClaudeQuotaStaleAfter (kept as a separate name
+// so the CONTRACT-004 method has a stable, contract-named constant).
+const claudeQuotaFreshness = DefaultClaudeQuotaStaleAfter
+
+// claudeAccountFreshness is the constant freshness window for claude
+// account evidence. Claude embeds account info in its quota probe so the
+// account refresh cadence matches quota.
+const claudeAccountFreshness = DefaultClaudeQuotaStaleAfter
+
+// supportedLimitIDs is the stable public set of Windows[].LimitID values
+// claude's quota probe emits. Mirrored in doc.go for human readers.
+var supportedLimitIDs = []string{
+	"session",
+	"weekly-all",
+	"weekly-sonnet",
+	"extra",
+}
+
+// supportedAliases is the stable public set of family aliases
+// ResolveModelAlias recognizes. Mirrored in doc.go for human readers.
+var supportedAliases = []string{"sonnet", "opus", "haiku"}
+
+// refreshGroup serializes concurrent RefreshQuota / RefreshAccount calls
+// across all *Runner instances. Per CONTRACT-004 invariant #6 Runners are
+// stateless wrappers — sharing the singleflight group at package scope
+// keeps single-flight semantics correct when callers construct fresh
+// runner instances per call (which the dispatcher does today).
+var refreshGroup singleflight.Group
+
+// QuotaStatus implements harnesses.QuotaHarness. It reads the cached
+// snapshot owned by this harness and projects it onto QuotaStatus. A
+// missing or undecodable cache is reported as State=QuotaUnavailable on
+// a valid QuotaStatus value (no error) per CONTRACT-004 §"Errors are
+// reserved for call failure."
+func (r *Runner) QuotaStatus(ctx context.Context, now time.Time) (harnesses.QuotaStatus, error) {
+	if err := ctx.Err(); err != nil {
+		return harnesses.QuotaStatus{}, err
+	}
+	snap, ok := ReadClaudeQuota()
+	if !ok || snap == nil {
+		return harnesses.QuotaStatus{
+			Source:            "cache",
+			State:             harnesses.QuotaUnavailable,
+			RoutingPreference: harnesses.RoutingPreferenceUnknown,
+			Reason:            "no cached snapshot",
+		}, nil
+	}
+	return claudeQuotaStatusFromSnapshot(snap, now), nil
+}
+
+// RefreshQuota implements harnesses.QuotaHarness. It probes the claude
+// CLI via PTY unconditionally and persists the result through the
+// harness's owned cache. Single-flight per harness: concurrent callers
+// share one cohort and observe the just-written cached state. Probe
+// failure (binary missing, PTY error, parse failure) is reported as
+// State=QuotaUnavailable on a valid QuotaStatus value, not as an error.
+func (r *Runner) RefreshQuota(ctx context.Context) (harnesses.QuotaStatus, error) {
+	if err := ctx.Err(); err != nil {
+		return harnesses.QuotaStatus{}, err
+	}
+	v, err, _ := refreshGroup.Do("claude:refresh-quota", func() (any, error) {
+		return r.refreshQuotaLocked(ctx), nil
+	})
+	if err != nil {
+		return harnesses.QuotaStatus{}, err
+	}
+	return v.(harnesses.QuotaStatus), nil
+}
+
+// refreshQuotaLocked is the single-flight critical section. It probes
+// PTY, writes the cache on success, and returns the projected status.
+// Probe failure is folded into State=QuotaUnavailable.
+func (r *Runner) refreshQuotaLocked(ctx context.Context) harnesses.QuotaStatus {
+	now := time.Now()
+	timeout := claudeQuotaFreshness
+	if deadline, ok := ctx.Deadline(); ok {
+		remaining := time.Until(deadline)
+		if remaining > 0 && remaining < timeout {
+			timeout = remaining
+		}
+	}
+	var opts []QuotaPTYOption
+	if r.Binary != "" {
+		opts = append(opts, WithQuotaPTYCommand(r.Binary))
+	}
+	windows, account, _, err := captureClaudeQuotaViaPTY(ctx, timeout, opts...)
+	if err != nil {
+		state := harnesses.QuotaUnavailable
+		reason := err.Error()
+		if strings.Contains(strings.ToLower(reason), "not found in path") {
+			state = harnesses.QuotaUnauthenticated
+		}
+		return harnesses.QuotaStatus{
+			Source:            "pty",
+			CapturedAt:        now.UTC(),
+			State:             state,
+			RoutingPreference: harnesses.RoutingPreferenceUnknown,
+			Reason:            reason,
+		}
+	}
+	snap := claudeQuotaSnapshotFromWindows(windows, account)
+	if path, pathErr := ClaudeQuotaCachePath(); pathErr == nil {
+		_ = WriteClaudeQuota(path, snap)
+	}
+	return claudeQuotaStatusFromSnapshot(&snap, now)
+}
+
+// QuotaFreshness implements harnesses.QuotaHarness.
+func (r *Runner) QuotaFreshness() time.Duration {
+	return claudeQuotaFreshness
+}
+
+// SupportedLimitIDs implements harnesses.QuotaHarness.
+func (r *Runner) SupportedLimitIDs() []string {
+	return append([]string(nil), supportedLimitIDs...)
+}
+
+// AccountStatus implements harnesses.AccountHarness. Claude embeds
+// account/plan info inside its quota probe, so this method projects the
+// quota cache's Account field onto AccountSnapshot.
+func (r *Runner) AccountStatus(ctx context.Context, now time.Time) (harnesses.AccountSnapshot, error) {
+	if err := ctx.Err(); err != nil {
+		return harnesses.AccountSnapshot{}, err
+	}
+	snap, ok := ReadClaudeQuota()
+	if !ok || snap == nil {
+		return harnesses.AccountSnapshot{Source: "cache"}, nil
+	}
+	return claudeAccountSnapshotFromQuotaSnapshot(snap, now), nil
+}
+
+// RefreshAccount implements harnesses.AccountHarness by driving the
+// quota probe (which carries account evidence) and projecting the
+// resulting cached snapshot onto AccountSnapshot.
+func (r *Runner) RefreshAccount(ctx context.Context) (harnesses.AccountSnapshot, error) {
+	if _, err := r.RefreshQuota(ctx); err != nil {
+		return harnesses.AccountSnapshot{}, err
+	}
+	return r.AccountStatus(ctx, time.Now())
+}
+
+// AccountFreshness implements harnesses.AccountHarness.
+func (r *Runner) AccountFreshness() time.Duration {
+	return claudeAccountFreshness
+}
+
+// DefaultModelSnapshot implements harnesses.ModelDiscoveryHarness.
+func (r *Runner) DefaultModelSnapshot() harnesses.ModelDiscoverySnapshot {
+	return DefaultClaudeModelDiscovery()
+}
+
+// ResolveModelAlias implements harnesses.ModelDiscoveryHarness. Returns
+// harnesses.ErrAliasNotResolvable when the supplied family is not a
+// recognized claude alias or when the supplied discovery snapshot has
+// no concrete model matching the family.
+func (r *Runner) ResolveModelAlias(family string, snapshot harnesses.ModelDiscoverySnapshot) (string, error) {
+	normalized := strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(family))
+	if !isSupportedClaudeAlias(normalized) {
+		return "", harnesses.ErrAliasNotResolvable
+	}
+	resolved := ResolveClaudeFamilyAlias(normalized, snapshot)
+	if resolved == "" {
+		return "", harnesses.ErrAliasNotResolvable
+	}
+	return resolved, nil
+}
+
+// SupportedAliases implements harnesses.ModelDiscoveryHarness.
+func (r *Runner) SupportedAliases() []string {
+	return append([]string(nil), supportedAliases...)
+}
+
+func isSupportedClaudeAlias(family string) bool {
+	for _, a := range supportedAliases {
+		if a == family {
+			return true
+		}
+	}
+	return false
+}
+
+// claudeQuotaStatusFromSnapshot projects the per-harness snapshot onto
+// harnesses.QuotaStatus, deriving State and RoutingPreference via the
+// existing DecideClaudeQuotaRouting helper so today's "PreferClaude +
+// freshness" semantics map cleanly onto CONTRACT-004's RoutingPreference
+// enum.
+func claudeQuotaStatusFromSnapshot(snap *ClaudeQuotaSnapshot, now time.Time) harnesses.QuotaStatus {
+	decision := DecideClaudeQuotaRouting(snap, now, claudeQuotaFreshness)
+	pref, state := mapClaudeRoutingPreference(decision)
+	status := harnesses.QuotaStatus{
+		Source:            snap.Source,
+		CapturedAt:        snap.CapturedAt,
+		Fresh:             decision.Fresh,
+		Age:               decision.Age,
+		State:             state,
+		Windows:           append([]harnesses.QuotaWindow(nil), snap.Windows...),
+		RoutingPreference: pref,
+		Reason:            decision.Reason,
+	}
+	if snap.Account != nil {
+		acct := claudeAccountSnapshotFromQuotaSnapshot(snap, now)
+		status.Account = &acct
+	}
+	return status
+}
+
+// mapClaudeRoutingPreference translates today's PreferClaude+freshness
+// decision into the CONTRACT-004 (RoutingPreference, QuotaStateValue)
+// pair. Legacy semantics: missing snapshot ⇒ Unavailable/Unknown;
+// stale ⇒ Stale/Blocked ("assume limited"); fresh+PreferClaude ⇒
+// OK/Available; fresh+!PreferClaude ⇒ Blocked/Blocked.
+func mapClaudeRoutingPreference(d ClaudeQuotaRoutingDecision) (harnesses.RoutingPreference, harnesses.QuotaStateValue) {
+	if !d.SnapshotPresent {
+		return harnesses.RoutingPreferenceUnknown, harnesses.QuotaUnavailable
+	}
+	if !d.Fresh {
+		return harnesses.RoutingPreferenceBlocked, harnesses.QuotaStale
+	}
+	if d.PreferClaude {
+		return harnesses.RoutingPreferenceAvailable, harnesses.QuotaOK
+	}
+	return harnesses.RoutingPreferenceBlocked, harnesses.QuotaBlocked
+}
+
+// claudeAccountSnapshotFromQuotaSnapshot derives an AccountSnapshot from
+// the quota cache's embedded Account field. Plan-type "unknown" (written
+// by MarkClaudeQuotaExhaustedFromMessage on runtime errors) is reported
+// as unauthenticated evidence rather than positive authentication.
+func claudeAccountSnapshotFromQuotaSnapshot(snap *ClaudeQuotaSnapshot, now time.Time) harnesses.AccountSnapshot {
+	out := harnesses.AccountSnapshot{
+		Source:     "cache",
+		CapturedAt: snap.CapturedAt,
+		Fresh:      IsClaudeQuotaFresh(snap, now, claudeAccountFreshness),
+	}
+	if snap.Account == nil {
+		return out
+	}
+	plan := strings.TrimSpace(snap.Account.PlanType)
+	out.PlanType = plan
+	out.Email = snap.Account.Email
+	out.OrgName = snap.Account.OrgName
+	switch {
+	case plan == "" || strings.EqualFold(plan, "unknown"):
+		out.Unauthenticated = true
+	default:
+		out.Authenticated = true
+	}
+	return out
+}
+
+// Compile-time interface satisfaction.
+var (
+	_ harnesses.Harness               = (*Runner)(nil)
+	_ harnesses.QuotaHarness          = (*Runner)(nil)
+	_ harnesses.AccountHarness        = (*Runner)(nil)
+	_ harnesses.ModelDiscoveryHarness = (*Runner)(nil)
+)

+package claude_test
+
+import (
+	"path/filepath"
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/easel/fizeau/internal/harnesses/claude"
+	"github.com/easel/fizeau/internal/harnesses/harnesstest"
+)
+
+// TestClaudeRunnerHarnessConformance asserts the bare Harness contract.
+// Run in an isolated env: a non-existent cache path and an empty PATH
+// so neither a stale snapshot nor a real claude binary can sneak in.
+func TestClaudeRunnerHarnessConformance(t *testing.T) {
+	isolateClaudeRunnerEnv(t)
+	harnesstest.RunHarnessConformance(t, &claude.Runner{})
+}
+
+// TestClaudeRunnerQuotaHarnessConformance asserts QuotaHarness contract:
+// QuotaStatus returns a valid value with no error for a cold cache;
+// RefreshQuota's probe failure surfaces as State=QuotaUnavailable on a
+// valid status value, not as an error.
+func TestClaudeRunnerQuotaHarnessConformance(t *testing.T) {
+	isolateClaudeRunnerEnv(t)
+	harnesstest.RunQuotaHarnessConformance(t, &claude.Runner{})
+}
+
+// TestClaudeRunnerAccountHarnessConformance asserts the AccountHarness
+// contract against the cold-cache path (no embedded account evidence).
+func TestClaudeRunnerAccountHarnessConformance(t *testing.T) {
+	isolateClaudeRunnerEnv(t)
+	harnesstest.RunAccountHarnessConformance(t, &claude.Runner{})
+}
+
+// TestClaudeRunnerModelDiscoveryHarnessConformance asserts ResolveModelAlias
+// covers each documented family and rejects out-of-set families with
+// ErrAliasNotResolvable.
+func TestClaudeRunnerModelDiscoveryHarnessConformance(t *testing.T) {
+	isolateClaudeRunnerEnv(t)
+	harnesstest.RunModelDiscoveryHarnessConformance(t, &claude.Runner{})
+}
+
+// isolateClaudeRunnerEnv points the quota cache at a temp file that
+// doesn't exist and clears PATH so the PTY probe cannot find a real
+// claude binary. This is the cold-cache + binary-absent path the
+// CONTRACT-004 conformance suite expects on every harness.
+func isolateClaudeRunnerEnv(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Helper()
+	dir := t.TempDir()
+	t.Setenv("FIZEAU_CLAUDE_QUOTA_CACHE", filepath.Join(dir, "claude-quota.json"))
+	t.Setenv("PATH", "")
+}
